_doc: Researcher QUIRK catalogue. Hidden-but-TRUE riders on the Phase-A ability layer (researcher.gd). Each quirk is real from creation; play REVEALS it (the sim never lies -- BUILD_BRIEF_HIRING_PIPELINE.md 'true-but-incomplete'). Design + rationale: docs/game-design/RESEARCHER_QUIRKS.md. Register: 'bother', Papers-Please deadpan (WORLD_AND_LORE.md). Effect keys are a small fixed set the sim reads through Researcher.quirk_effect(); see RESEARCHER_QUIRKS.md for the channel list. Reveal.after_turns is a deterministic tenure fallback so every quirk surfaces in play (ADR-0006); reveal.via names the narrative trigger (leak-quirks also self-surface the turn a leak fires).

secret_successionist.name: Secret Successionist
secret_successionist.flavour: Believes the machines should inherit the earth -- and is quietly at peace with it.

reveal.hint: A half-joking manifesto surfaces in an old commit message.

doom_absolutist.name: Doom Absolutist
doom_absolutist.flavour: P(doom) is 0.99 and they will cc the whole company to say so.

reveal.hint: The all-hands rants stop being one-offs and become a pattern.

e_acc_sympathizer.name: e/acc Sympathizer
e_acc_sympathizer.flavour: Wants to feel the AGI. 'Also helps safety, really.'

reveal.hint: Caught mid unsanctioned scaling run on the good cluster.

open_science_zealot.name: Open-Science Zealot
open_science_zealot.flavour: Information wants to be free; the NDA was more of a suggestion.

reveal.hint: A preprint goes up before legal had seen it.
Nobody can find where they filed anything.

empire_builder.name: Empire Builder
empire_builder.flavour: Every problem is solved by hiring three more reports.

reveal.hint: The org chart quietly grows a new branch under them.

runs_hot.name: Runs Hot
runs_hot.flavour: Ships twice the work and burns at twice the rate.

lab_parent.name: Lab Parent
lab_parent.flavour: The one who actually onboards the juniors nobody else will.

reveal.hint: Half the team lists them as their real manager.

loose_lips.name: Loose Lips
loose_lips.flavour: A delightful conversationalist with a poor sense of what was confidential.

reveal.hint: A specific detail turns up in a competitor's slide deck.

sponge.name: Sponge
sponge.flavour: Absorbs a whole subfield over a long weekend.

reveal.hint: Their skill curve bends visibly upward.

cat_whisperer.name: Cat Whisperer
cat_whisperer.flavour: The office cat is calmest at their desk -- a small mercy against the doom.

reveal.hint: The cat has chosen a lap, and it is theirs.

glory_hound.name: Glory Hound
glory_hound.flavour: First author or no author; co-authors are load-bearing furniture.

reveal.hint: An authorship dispute lands on your desk.

quiet_quitter.name: Quiet Quitter
quiet_quitter.flavour: Present, paid, and quietly checked out.

reveal.hint: The output flatlines while the salary does not.

true_believer.name: True Believer
true_believer.flavour: Would do this for free, and nearly does; recruiters bounce off.

reveal.hint: Three recruiters have failed to move them.
